critiques.finding: MilestoneCard delete icon (ai_RNbBHXjm) still shares onEditMilestone with edit (ai_RNbBHXjk) and retains aria-label 'Edit milestone options' — JOURNAL-05 triage deferred distinct delete semantics to JOURNAL-06 but card-level affordance was not updated.
critiques.alternative: Route ai_RNbBHXjm to open EditMilestonePopup with delete-focused focus state, or add aria-label 'Delete milestone' and document that delete is only available inside the edit popup.
evidence: frontend/src/components/journal/MilestoneCard.tsx — ai_RNbBHXjm onClick={() => onEditMilestone(milestone)}

critiques.finding: EditMilestonePopup delete (ai_RNbBHXmU) fires immediately with no confirmation step — destructive one-click removal unlike journal entry delete which uses AlertDialog.
critiques.alternative: Add AlertDialog confirm before deleteMilestone, matching Journal.tsx entry-delete pattern and reducing accidental data loss.
evidence: frontend/src/components/journal/EditMilestonePopup.tsx — handleDelete
frontend/src/pages/Journal.tsx — AlertDialog for journal entry delete

critiques.finding: Popup header copy ('Celebrate a win worth remembering', 'Update or remove this milestone') is React-authored; IR text_expressions on ai_RNbBHXlj/ai_RNbBHXlk are dynamic pointers — static Bubble strings were not extracted from drsam-99657.bubble for parity verification.
critiques.alternative: Resolve text_expressions from bubble source and align subtitle/title strings when static literals exist in the export.
